'''Jean-Philippe Baile''' (born 7 June 1987) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays for [[AS Carcassonne]].

Baile's position of choice is as a {{rlp|ce}}.

==France==
He was part of the [[2008 Rugby League World Cup squads#France|France squad]] for the [[2008 Rugby League World Cup]].<ref name="France name official squad">{{cite web|url=http://www.rlwc08.com/news/news/archive/2008/09/24/france-name-official-squad.aspx |title=France name official squad |publisher=RLWC2008 |date=24 September 2008 |access-date=2008-10-03 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20080930072635/http://www.rlwc08.com/news/news/archive/2008/09/24/france-name-official-squad.aspx |archive-date=30 September 2008 }}</ref>

In 2010 he represented France again in the [[Alitalia European Cup]], and he also played in the [[2013 Rugby League World Cup]], [[2014 European Cup (rugby league)|2014 European Cup]] and [[2015 European Cup]]. He also played for France in their 2015 European Cup mid-tournament test-match against England. He was a part what was considered a 'weakened' French side due to injury and it showed with an appalling showing against their opponents.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/live/match/43791/report|title=England demolish France 84-4 in record win|publisher=Sky Sports|access-date=24 October 2015}}</ref>

==Bradford Bulls==
'''2015''' – [[2015 Bradford Bulls season|2015 Season]]

Baile signed for Bradford on a one-year deal. He featured in the pre-season friendly against [[Castleford Tigers|Castleford]].

He featured in Round 2 against [[Whitehaven R.L.F.C.|Whitehaven]] to Round 4 [[Hunslet R.L.F.C.|Hunslet Hawks]] then in Round 6 [[Workington Town]] to Round 7 [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]]. He featured in Round 10 [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster]] then in Round 12 Whitehaven R.L.F.C. to Round 16 Doncaster R.L.F.C. He featured in Qualifier 7 Halifax R.L.F.C. He played in the £1 Million Game against the [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]]. Baile also played in the [[Challenge Cup]] in Round 5 against [[Hull Kingston Rovers]].

'''2016''' – [[2016 Bradford Bulls season|2016 Season]]

Baile did not feature in any of the pre-season friendlies. He played in Round 8 Halifax R.L.F.C. Baile left the club halfway through the season.
